HOW TO GET DIRTY

MOLD A WALLET

Download Phantom or Solflare. Set up your vault and keep your seed phrase secret from the mud-monsters!

Buy SOL from an exchange and send it to your wallet. You need the fuel to fire the kiln!

3

Head over to Pump.fun or Raydium and paste our contract address in the search bar.

4

Smash that swap button! Mold your SOL into $CLAY and watch the masterpiece take shape!

THE MOLDING TRUTH
